title: Cozy Modpack by remkkic
description: A smooth, cozy, and aesthetic modpack for streaming and survival.
body:
# remkkic's Cozy Pack 🌸

The ultimate **1.21.1 Fabric** experience for streamers and survival enjoyers. This pack balances high performance with a beautiful, cozy aesthetic.

### ✨ Shaders & Visuals
* **Built-in Shaders:** Includes **Bliss**, **Complementary Unbound**, and **Mellow** for the best lighting.
* **Dynamic Lights:** Real-time lighting via **LambDynamicLights**.
* **Immersive Fixes:** Better textures with **Continuity** and smooth animations with **Not Enough Animations**.

### 🚀 Performance
* Powered by **Sodium**, **Entity Culling**, and **Iris** for maximum FPS even with shaders.
* Includes **RenderScale** to fine-tune your performance on any Mac or PC.

### 🛠 Utility & UI
* **Maps:** Full navigation with **Xaero's Minimap** and **World Map**.
* **Inventory:** Sorting and management via **Inventory Profiles Next (IPN)**.
* **Custom Look:** Unique loading screens and menus with **FancyMenu** and **Drippy Loading Screen**.
* **Essential Tools:** **Zoomify**, **Shulker Box Tooltip**, and **Mod Menu**.

### Information
* **Version:** 1.21.1
* **Loader:** Fabric
* **Focus:** Aesthetics & Optimization

Enjoy your cozy adventures!
![Cozy cherry blossom base with shaders.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c9d357482f59238e4ffcae00e4816304f44426.png)
